title: K-200 Nav/GNC Interface Control Document
text:
# K-200 Nav/GNC Interface Control Document

Document number: MD-DOC-489-A. Revision: A. Type: ICD. Author: Marcus Thaine. Created: 2023-05-15. Last modified: 2023-11-30. Status: Released.

This document defines the requirements, interfaces, and verification approach for the Nav/GNC subsystem of the Kestrel K-200. Referenced parts: P-1049, P-1105.
